cases.input: This failure happened again. Turn this into a permanent fix with a skill, tests, evals, and a resolver trigger.
We keep applying the same repeated manual workaround after every release. Codify this failure so it never happens again.
Write a skill, deterministic code, unit tests, LLM evals, and a resolver trigger for this failure.
We are not allowed to do one-off work here. Make this a permanent structural fix.
Add a new remind command that schedules a one-shot cron task.
Fix the duplicate cron bug in the reminder command.
Document how reminders work in the README.
Write a skill for code review.
